case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK USA N.A. VS. MARCIANNE P MORRIS et al

docket_entries.description: AFFIDAVIT OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK USA N.A.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST MARK D. WALSH, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-17-2010, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-02-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-17-2010 CONTINUED TO JAN-19-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK USA N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORRIS, MARCIANNE P $5,869.26 PRINCIPAL, $950.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,214.19 INTEREST, $269.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,302.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
